name: DATOMS Cold Storage Monitoring
colors: Primary: Orange/Amber (#ff8500), Background: White (#ffffff) and Soft Orange (rgba(255,133,0,0.06)), Borders: Light Gray (#eeeeee), Text: Dark Charcoal (#111111)
typography: Fonts: Poppins, Inter, sans-serif; clean typography with bold headers and varying weights.
components: Navigation bar (.datoms-nav), responsive panel widgets, 3-column features grid (.modules), equipment status cards, contact Forms, Call-To-Action (CTA) buttons
spacing_and_grid: Responsive columns layout with margins and grid layouts. Grids use 16px to 36px spacing.
assets_list: SVG stroke icons, hardware diagram images, cloud compliance illustrations, client brand logos
